product_overview: A web dashboard for admins to authenticate, manage users, assign students to lists/rooms, filter and export data, and run reports. The provided raw PRD includes a test scenario and admin credentials (admin@youruniversity.edu / admin1234) to validate adding a student, assigning rooms, making payments, and moving a student between rooms.
core_goals: Provide secure authentication with persistent sessions and logout functionality
Allow admins to create and remove user accounts via Settings
Enable assigning students to lists/rooms quickly using L1–L4 actions
Support filtering of student lists by department and stage
Provide export capabilities for lists and reports
Support student lifecycle operations: add student, record payments, and move students between rooms

features.name: Authentication
features.description: Sign in and sign out flow with persistent sessions for admins and redirect behavior for unauthenticated access.
user_flows: Navigate to /login -> Fill email input field (admin@youruniversity.edu) -> Fill password input field (admin1234) -> Click Sign In button to submit -> See dashboard at / -> Refresh page -> See dashboard still accessible (session persists)
Navigate to /login -> Fill email input field -> Fill password input field (wrong password) -> Click Sign In button to submit -> See error on invalid credentials
Navigate to / -> Click Logout button -> See redirect to /login -> Navigate to / -> See redirect to /login (unauthenticated access prevented)

features.name: User Management
features.description: Create and delete user accounts from the Settings page for admin user management.
user_flows: Navigate to /settings -> Fill new user form -> Click create user -> See new user listed on /settings
Navigate to /settings -> Fill new user form with invalid email -> Click create user -> See validation error on form
Navigate to /settings -> Select an existing user -> Click delete user -> See user removed from list
Navigate to /settings while logged out -> See redirect to /login (access denied)

features.name: Assign Students (L1 - L4)
features.description: Assign students to lists or rooms using the L1, L2, L3, L4 actions on the main dashboard.
user_flows: Navigate to / -> Identify student row in list -> Click L1 button for a student -> See student status update to L1 -> Navigate to /list/[id] -> See student present in selected list
Navigate to / -> Click L2 button for a student without selecting a student row -> See validation or selection error (no assignment performed)
Navigate to / -> Identify student row -> Click L4 button for a student -> See UI update reflecting assignment to L4

features.name: Filter Data
features.description: Filter the dashboard student list by department and stage to narrow results.
user_flows: Navigate to / -> Select department from dropdown -> Select stage from dropdown -> See filtered student list matching department and stage
Navigate to / -> Select department from dropdown that has no students -> Select stage from dropdown -> See 'No results found' message
Navigate to / -> Clear department dropdown selection -> See full student list restored

features.name: Export Data
features.description: Export lists and reports from the dashboard to downloadable files.
user_flows: Navigate to / -> Click export button -> See export progress indicator -> See download start or export success confirmation
Navigate to / -> Click export button -> See export error message (e.g., server error) -> See instruction to retry

features.name: Student Lifecycle (Add student, Payments, Move rooms)
features.description: Support adding a student, assigning them to a room, recording payments, and moving them between rooms (derived from the raw PRD test instructions).
user_flows: Navigate to /login -> Fill email input field (admin@youruniversity.edu) -> Fill password input field (admin1234) -> Click Sign In button to submit -> See dashboard at /
Navigate to / -> Click Add Student button -> Fill student form fields -> Click Save or Create Student -> See new student appear in main list
Navigate to / -> Identify newly created student -> Click L1 button for a student to assign to a room -> See student assigned to L1 -> Navigate to /list/[id] -> See student listed in that room
Navigate to / -> Identify student assigned to a room -> Click Make Payment button for student -> Fill payment information -> Click Submit Payment -> See payment confirmation message
Navigate to / -> Identify student with a payment recorded -> Click Move Student action -> Select target room -> Click Confirm Move -> Navigate to /list/[targetId] -> See student present in new room
Navigate to / -> Click Add Student button -> Leave required field blank -> Click Save or Create Student -> See form validation error preventing student creation
Navigate to / -> Identify student -> Click Make Payment button -> Enter invalid payment details -> Click Submit Payment -> See payment failure message
Navigate to / -> Identify student -> Click Move Student action -> Select a full or invalid target room -> Click Confirm Move -> See error message 'room full' or 'invalid target' and no move occurs

routes.description: Main dashboard and student assignment list

features.name: Authentication
user_interactions: Click Sign In button to submit

features.name: User Management
features.description: Create and delete users from the Settings page

features.name: Assign Students
features.description: Assigning students to lists (L1, L2, L3, L4 buttons)
user_interactions: Click L1, L2, L3, or L4 button for a student

features.name: Filter Data
features.description: Filter data by department or stage
